skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: AI-powered short video creation agent. Handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music for product ads, social media content, brand videos, and explainers.
skill.summary: Professional AI video creation agent that transforms text prompts into 5-120 second videos with automated cinematography and editing.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 492 patterns inherent to bash scripting. All findings evaluated as FALSE_POSITIVES. The skill is a legitimate CLI wrapper for the Pexo AI video API. Shell command substitution is standard bash syntax for capturing command output, not code injection. Network requests target the configured Pexo API endpoint (pexo.ai) for video generation. Config file storage (~/.pexo/config) follows CLI best practices for API credentials. The only risk factor is standard CLI tool behavior: local script execution, credential storage, and API communication.

medium_findings.title: Shell Script Execution Pattern
medium_findings.description: Multiple shell scripts use command substitution $(...) and backticks for capturing command output. While flagged by static analysis, this is standard bash scripting practice for a CLI tool wrapper.

low_findings.title: API Credential Storage
low_findings.description: The skill stores API credentials in ~/.pexo/config file. This is standard practice for CLI tools but should be documented for users.

low_findings.title: External API Communication
low_findings.description: All video generation requests are sent to pexo.ai API endpoints. Users should trust the Pexo service for their video content.

content.user_title: Create AI-Generated Videos from Text Prompts
content.value_statement: Professional video creation is time-consuming and requires expensive tools. Pexo Agent transforms text descriptions into polished 5-120 second videos with automated scriptwriting, cinematography, and editing.
actual_capabilities: Generate 5-120 second videos from text descriptions
Handle image, video, and audio file uploads as references
Iterative video revision based on feedback
Real-time status polling with preview options
limitations: Cannot crawl or process URLs directly - files must be downloaded first
Video generation takes 15-20 minutes for short videos
Requires Pexo API key and account setup
Cannot generate videos longer than 120 seconds

use_cases.title: E-commerce Product Videos
use_cases.description: Create promotional videos for online store products by uploading product photos and describing the desired style and messaging.

use_cases.title: Social Media Content
use_cases.description: Generate TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts content from simple text prompts about topic and tone.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media managers

use_cases.title: Explainer Videos
use_cases.description: Produce animated explainer videos for SaaS features, app tutorials, or educational content without hiring videographers.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Product Demo
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 15-second product video for wireless headphones showing someone using them while jogging, with upbeat music and modern aesthetic.
prompt_templates.scenario: Basic product demonstration for e-commerce listing

prompt_templates.title: Social Media Teaser
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a 10-second vertical video teaser for a new coffee shop opening. Use warm colors, show steaming coffee, include text overlay saying 'Coming Soon'.
prompt_templates.scenario: Instagram Stories or TikTok promotional content

prompt_templates.title: Feature Announcement
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second explainer video for our new AI chatbot feature. Show conversation flow, highlight key benefits like 24/7 support and instant responses.

prompt_templates.title: Brand Story with Reference Images
prompt_templates.prompt: Produce a 45-second brand story video using the uploaded logo and product images. Focus on sustainability and craftsmanship. Use natural lighting and earth tones.
prompt_templates.scenario: Brand video with custom assets for website landing page

output_examples.input: Create a 20-second video for a handmade soap brand with lavender scent, targeting wellness-focused customers
output_examples.output: Video generated featuring soft purple and white color palette, slow-motion soap cutting shots, lavender flower close-ups, gentle water ripples, and elegant typography displaying product benefits.

output_examples.input: Make a 15-second vertical video showing a smartphone app interface with smooth transitions between screens
output_examples.output: 9:16 aspect ratio video with animated phone mockup, smooth swipe transitions between app screens, highlighted UI elements, and upbeat background music matching the modern tech aesthetic.

best_practices: Be specific about video duration, aspect ratio, and target audience in your initial prompt
Upload reference images when describing products or specific visual elements
Review preview options carefully before selecting the final version
Provide iterative feedback for refinements rather than starting over
anti_patterns: Do not add technical specifications the user did not request (duration, style, etc.) - Pexo will ask clarifying questions
Do not skip polling for status - video generation requires waiting 15-20 minutes with periodic checks
Do not send web URLs directly to Pexo - download files first, then upload
Do not use markdown links for video URLs in delivery - send full URLs as plain text

faq.question: How do I get a Pexo API key?
faq.answer: Visit pexo.ai and log in to your account. Navigate to API Keys from the top-right menu and create a new key. The key will be prefixed with 'sk-'.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Short videos (5-30 seconds) typically take 15-20 minutes. Longer or more complex videos may take additional time. The skill polls every 60 seconds and provides status updates.

faq.question: What file types can I upload?
faq.answer: Images: JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, HEIC, HEIF. Videos: MP4, MOV, AVI. Audio: MP3, WAV, AAC, M4A, OGG, FLAC.

faq.question: Can I request changes to a generated video?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the same project ID and send feedback like 'make the colors warmer' or 'add more transitions'. The skill handles iterative revisions.

faq.question: What video aspect ratios are supported?
faq.answer: Three aspect ratios are available: 16:9 (landscape for YouTube), 9:16 (vertical for TikTok/Reels), and 1:1 (square for social posts).

faq.question: Why can't I just send a URL to an image?
faq.answer: Pexo cannot crawl external URLs. You must first download the file locally, then use the upload script to send it to Pexo's servers.
